title: simaba cuspidata var. nigrescens
intro: Simaba cuspidata var. nigrescens is a plant species commonly known as Black Simaba or Black Toothache Tree, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including toothaches, gum infections, and digestive problems, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. Simaba cuspidata var. nigrescens can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote oral health and prevent infections.
